parameters.jsCode: const m = {video_id: $node['Extract Channel Info'].json.videoId, channel: $node['Extract Channel Info'].json.channel, filename: $node['Extract Channel Info'].json.filename, transcription: $node['Whisper Transcribe'].json.text, content: {tiktok: $json.tiktok, instagram: $json.instagram, youtube: $json.youtube}, created_at: new Date().toISOString()}; const fs = require('fs'), d = '/workspace/.state/videos'; if (!fs.existsSync(d)) fs.mkdirSync(d, {recursive: true}); fs.writeFileSync(`${d}/${m.video_id}.json`, JSON.stringify(m, null, 2)); return {json: m};
